creator: ports@toco-domains.de
text:
Created attachment 170880
shar with new port devel/rubygem-health_check

Hello,

attached a shar with this new port. This port is introduced as a needed RUN_DEPENDS for the www/gitlab update. 

Buildtests are fine for 9.3, 10.0, 10.2 and 10.3 amd64 and i386. portlint is also fine. I also did a short runtime test using irb.

Greetings,
Torsten
